name: sma-geo-site
description: SMA enterprise AI gateway content site (GEO)

scripts.build: astro build && node scripts/generate-robots.mjs && node scripts/generate-llms.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
scripts.test: node tests/validate-lockfile.mjs && node tests/validate-robots-txt.mjs && node tests/validate-llms-txt.mjs && node tests/validate-indexnow-gate.mjs && node tests/validate-baidu-gate.mjs && node tests/validate-single-host.mjs && node tests/validate-links-schema.mjs && node scripts/check-terminology.mjs && python3 tests/test_parse_crawlers.py && python3 tests/test_track_citations.py
